## Source: amazon-inspector (4de7c58d59c5e16064d8ecf21d0f57675869c93be663ac27da95d040be7d0aff)
The package gprofiler was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (5f7d3be4072f4f630de559dc39dc99dc2fc4988da4daaf49ecb90658b8a261c8)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'gprofiler' @ 9.9.9 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
